format.raw: $DATE FTD-0-430001 DeviceUUID $DEVICE_UUID, SrcIP $SRC_IP, DstIP $DST_IP, SrcPort $SRC_PORT, DstPort $DST_PORT, Protocol tcp, IngressInterface DMZOutside, EgressInterface DMZ, IngressZone DMZOutside, EgressZone DMZ, Priority 1, GID 1, SID 13719, Revision 6, Message $ATTACK_NAME, Classification Attempted Administrator Privilege Gain, User No Authentication Required, Client SSL client, ApplicationProtocol SSL, IntrusionPolicy SJBBIPSDMZ, ACPolicy SJBBCSIPS, NAPPolicy Network Analysis

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="Key&Value4" arr_length="24">
    <Field position="0"  name="syslog_msg_cd" />
    <Field position="1"  name="application_protocol" org_name="ApplicationProtocol" />
    <Field position="2"  name="src_port"            org_name="SrcPort" />
    <Field position="3"  name="gid"                 org_name="GID" />
    <Field position="4"  name="user"                org_name="User" />
    <Field position="5"  name="msg"                 org_name="Message" />
    <Field position="6"  name="nap_policy"          org_name="NAPPolicy" />
    <Field position="7"  name="priority"            org_name="Priority" />
    <Field position="8"  name="ingress_zone"        org_name="IngressZone" />
    <Field position="9"  name="ingress_interface"   org_name="IngressInterface" />
    <Field position="10" name="intrusion_policy"    org_name="IntrusionPolicy" />
    <Field position="11" name="egress_zone"         org_name="EgressZone" />
    <Field position="12" name="dstn_port"           org_name="DstPort" />
    <Field position="13" name="eqp_dt" />
    <Field position="14" name="src_ip"              org_name="SrcIP" />
    <Field position="15" name="sid"                 org_name="SID" />
    <Field position="16" name="device_uid"          org_name="DeviceUUID" />
    <Field position="17" name="egress_interface"    org_name="EgressInterface" />
    <Field position="18" name="revision"            org_name="Revision" />
    <Field position="19" name="ac_policy"           org_name="ACPolicy" />
    <Field position="20" name="classification"      org_name="Classification" />
    <Field position="21" name="dstn_ip"             org_name="DstIP" />
    <Field position="22" name="prtc"               org_name="Protocol" convert_tag="[[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="23" name="client"              org_name="Client" />
    <Field position="24" name="vendor"              convert_tag="[[@set('cisco')]]" />
    <Field position="25" name="model"               convert_tag="[[@set('firepower')]]" />
    <Field position="26" name="logtype"             convert_tag="[[@set('threat')]]" />
    <Field position="27" name="parser_version"      convert_tag="[[@set('v1')]]" />
    <Field position="28" name="original_log"        convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="29" name="eqp_type"            convert_tag="[[@set('fw')]]" />
    <Field position="30" name="parser_info"         convert_tag="[[@set('[Cisco]_firepower_security_v1_keyvalue')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>

scenarios.attackName: ET WEB_SERVER Possible Apache Struts RCE Attempt
